_comment: Claude adapter assembly spec. Tells gen/generate.py how to build the full
.claude/ adapter from the neutral source for the 'claude' harness. The
generator is intentionally THIN (arch note 'How thin the metalanguage can
be'): it inlines a neutral body, prepends the harness frontmatter from this
manifest, and copies the capability artifacts verbatim. No parsing, no
re-serialization — so byte-identity with the golden is trivially guaranteed.
'capability' on each entry names the harness-neutral capability (see
src/manifests/capabilities.json) the entry realizes, so the same body set can
be re-targeted to a second harness's adapter spec without touching src/.
